observation.summary: Vendor "Google" has search-crawler access allowed but no recorded model-training decision
evidence: crawlers registry contains no purpose=model_training entry for vendor Google

reasoning.applicable_requirement: Premise 3.3: crawler access for search is not permission for model training; GEO §2 access layers must not be conflated
reasoning.explanation: A vendor has an allow decision for search discovery, but no separate recorded decision for its model-training crawler.

remediation.preferred: Record an explicit allow/block decision, owner, and legal rationale for each training-purpose crawler of vendors whose search crawlers are allowed.

verification.method: Confirm a crawler registry entry with purpose model_training exists for the vendor.
verification.expected_result: detector no longer reports this subject

reasoning.applicable_requirement: SEO §2 meaningful main content; §4 sufficient depth
reasoning.explanation: An index-target page has very little primary text.
limitations: heuristic detection; verify manually before acting

remediation.preferred: Either add substantive content for the intent or remove the page from the index target set.

verification.method: Re-measure extracted word count after revision.
verification.expected_result: detector no longer reports this subject
